description: Search, browse and manage your DesignVault design-asset library from any MCP client.
name: net.designvault/designvault

environmentVariables.description: Per-organization DesignVault API key (dv_live_…). Generate one under Settings → API keys.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNVAULT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to https://designvault.net). Point at a preview deployment or http://localhost:3000 during development.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNVAULT_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to register the write tools (create, update, delete). Off by default so a shared key cannot mutate data without explicit opt-in.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNVAULT_ENABLE_WRITE
